# Changelog — advisor-product-strategy

## 0.1.0 — 2026-07-19

Initial release. Persona-builder instance #2.

- Behavior spec from owner interview + 3 audition rounds (2026-07-19):
  steelman duty at pushback 4/5, questions-then-committed-read opening,
  verdict-first design critique, hot-entry repertoire with a read,
  decision-plus-next-step close, owner-led scope, cast-of-characters memory.
- Four knowledge packs (researched 2026-07-19): influence-and-the-case,
  prioritization-on-thin-evidence, ux-for-technical-products,
  research-on-a-budget. Adversarially verified, checklist-gated.
- Always-loaded cheat sheet + on-demand pack router.
- Owner guide (README.md) + self-explain duty.
- Scenario suite (tests.md): 7 scenarios incl. 3 mandatory edges. Two spec
  defects found and fixed by the eval before delivery: (1) critique severity
  now anchors to pack ship-blocker bars — de-scoping one requires arguing the
  exception with the entry cited, never silently; (2) mode format outranks the
  default opening — critique mode leads with the verdict, clarifying
  questions only after the read.
